name: Pecan Rocca
recipeIngredient: 1/2 package (6 oz size) semisweet chocolate chips (1/2 cup)
recipeInstructions:
Toffee:
1. In a square pan (9x9x2 inches), spread the chopped nuts.
2. Heat sugar and butter to boiling, stirring constantly.
3. Continue boiling over medium heat, stirring constantly for 7 minutes.
4. Immediately spread the mixture evenly over the nuts in the pan.
5. Sprinkle chocolate pieces over the hot mixture.
6. Place a baking sheet over the pan to melt the chocolate using contained heat.
7. Spread the melted chocolate over the candy.
8. While still hot, cut into 1 1/2 inch squares and chill until firm.
Changes:
When preparing this as a gift:
1. Melt an additional 1/2 cup of chocolate in the microwave.
2. Use a smaller pan (7x7x2 inches) or similar size.
3. Spread the melted chocolate on top of the buttered pan covered with nuts.
4. After the chocolate is spread, sprinkle more nuts on top while the chocolate is still warm.
5. Cut into small pieces once set.
6. Remove from the pan and wrap individually in dessert foil.
